ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval On Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Aug-18-2025 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-30-2025 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (210 Dublin Street, San Francisco, Ca 94112)
Off Calendar Oct-31-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Ana Allec appeared via zoom for Debra Dolch (petitioner).
Ming Wu (realtor) appeared in person for and with Kai Li (buyer).

The sale was confirmed at $588,500.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed September 11, 2024. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property. Order is under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Colohour. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-15-2024 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-03-2024 Continued To Jul-15-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ana Alec appeared by zoom for Debra Dolch (petitioner).

Mrs. Alec presented oral argument to support her request to waive bond. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to July 15, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mrs. Dolch is to file a declaration detailing what she has spent on the estate, the costs of a bond and any other facts for the court's consideration for good cause.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Lopes. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-01-2024 Continued To Jul-03-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
